regulation_time_definition: 90 minutes + stoppage time. Extra time and penalty shootouts are excluded.
publish_mode_policy: market_reconciled is the publish champion when BDL odds are available.

prediction.tail_policy: Poisson mass beyond max_goals=15; grid is publish-normalized

edge_report.model_vs_market_summary: Model: H=40.8% D=29.2% A=30.0%  Market: H=40.8% A=29.9%  Value markets: 1
edge_report.disclaimer: Edge estimates are model outputs only. Not guaranteed profit signals.
